scope_note: QA Whittaker Rational Direction S2 Cert candidate family [273], unregistered pending hostile review. Layer 2 of the Whittaker -> QA development ladder. CLAIM (narrow): the QA-derived rational parameter pool R_m = {C/G, F/G : (b,e) in {1..m}^2, gcd(b,e)=1, d=b+e, a=b+2e, C=2*d*e, F=a*b, G=d*d+e*e} generates a finite exact rational S2 direction set D_m^(2) through the rational inverse stereographic chart S(r,s)=(2r/(1+r*r+s*s), 2s/(1+r*r+s*s), (1-r*r-s*s)/(1+r*r+s*s)). v1 moduli are m in {3,5,9}. Gates W3D_1-W3D_4 verify exact sphere identity, finite enumeration and duplicate accounting, chart/coverage discipline, and a finite denominator separation theorem: for distinct generated packets p_i=(x_i,y_i,z_i,den_i), p_j=(x_j,y_j,z_j,den_j), sin_sq(theta_ij)=cross_norm_sq_num/(den_i*den_i*den_j*den_j) >= 1/(den_i*den_i*den_j*den_j) >= 1/N_max(m)^4. Geometry uses pooled R_m while preserving C/F channel provenance metadata. The chart is inverse_stereographic_excluding_south_pole from positive QA ratios only; no full-sphere, antipodal, sign-reflection, density, or equidistribution claim is made. This cert does NOT prove Whittaker 1903, Maxwell equations, electromagnetism, scalar-potential physics, geodesy, ellipsoid physics, or the Whittaker wave kernel. W3D_5 spherical Lipschitz sampling is deferred. Sources: Whittaker 1903, On the partial differential equations of mathematical physics, Math. Annalen 57:333-355, DOI 10.1007/BF01444290; design draft docs/specs/QA_WHITTAKER_RATIONAL_DIRECTION_S2_CERT_DRAFT.md. Checks W3D_1/W3D_2/W3D_3/W3D_4/SRC/F; 3 PASS + 5 FAIL fixtures; self-test expected ok before hostile review.
